---
id: modify-group-specification-limits
title: "ModifyGroupLimit"
description: "通过此接口修改群组的以下规格限制："
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>ModifyGroupLimit</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过此接口修改群组的以下规格限制：

- 进群模式；
- 邀请模式；
- 受邀请模式；
- 群组成员人数上限（最高不超过套餐包的限制，详情请参考 [计费说明 - 版本差异](/zim-android/introduction/pricing#版本差异)）。

修改成功后，群成员可通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口接收群组规格限制修改的通知：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [groupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupverifyinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupverifyinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|-----|---------|---------|---------|
| [onGroupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |[onGroupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|--------------|-----------|
| [groupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupVerifyInfoUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupverifyinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">
参数 FromUserID 和 GroupId 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，''，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'，
'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，'{'，'}'，'|'，'~'`。

如果无需修改 `JoinMode`、`InviteMode` 或 `BeInvitedMode`，请不要请求 URL 中携带该参数。如果携带参数但没赋值，该参数的值可能会被修改为 0。
</Note>
<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=ModifyGroupLimit\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["ModifyGroupLimit"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"FromUserId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"修改操作者的用户 ID（已在客户端调用 login 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"operator_user"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"GroupId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"目标群组的 ID。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"group123"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"JoinMode","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"number","enum":[0,1,2]},"description":"加入群组的模式：\n- 0：（默认值）无需验证，任何人可以直接加入群。\n- 1：用户需发起入群申请，群主或群管理员批准后，该用户才能加入群。\n- 2：外部用户需经群内成员邀请方可入群。\n"}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"InviteMode","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"number","enum":[0,1]},"description":"邀请模式：\n- 0：（默认值）所有群成员都能邀请外部用户入群。\n- 1：只有群主或者群管理员可以发起邀请。\n"}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"BeInvitedMode","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"number","enum":[0,1]},"description":"受邀请模式：\n- 0：（默认值）可以直接邀请外部用户入群，无需对方同意。\n- 1：邀请某人加入群组后，需要对方同意。\n"}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"MemberCountLimit","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"群组成员人数上限，默认值为 0。"}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>

技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>输入的参数缺失或不合法。</td><td>请检查输入的参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300005</td><td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660500002</td><td>操作者用户未注册。</td><td>请先注册操作者用户。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600001</td><td>群不存在。</td><td>请确认输入的 GroupId 是否正确。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600009</td><td>获取群相关信息失败。</td><td>请先确认 GroupID 是否正确。如果正确，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
